scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cd backend && cross-env DATABASE_URL=jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5434/andpad DB_USER=andpad DB_PASSWORD=andpad JWT_SECRET=dev-local-secret-minimum-32-characters gradlew.bat bootRun
scripts.dev:java: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run dev:api:8082" "cross-env API_URL=http://localhost:8082 npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api:8082: cd backend && cross-env SERVER_PORT=8082 DATABASE_URL=jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5434/andpad DB_USER=andpad DB_PASSWORD=andpad JWT_SECRET=dev-local-secret-minimum-32-characters gradlew.bat bootRun
